hero.title: AI Talent Intelligence for Global Enterprises
hero.subtitle: Predict skills. Match talent. Build future-ready teams — at enterprise scale.
hero.description: LeapIn is the AI Talent Intelligence Platform that helps Fortune 500 organizations hire smarter, develop faster, and retain top talent across the entire talent lifecycle.

partners.title: Trusted by Leading Companies Worldwide
partners.description: Serving leading organizations across 8 major industries globally

features.title: Talent Is Now a Board-Level Risk
features.subtitle: The result: Talent becomes a constraint — not a competitive advantage.

items.label: Slow Hiring
items.description: Weeks of back-and-forth shrink to days. Our AI screens, ranks and schedules in minutes, so your best candidates are still excited when you say yes.

items.label: High Costs
items.description: Agency fees, ad spend and admin hours vanish. One subscription cuts total hire-cost up to 60 % while lifting quality of every single recruit.

items.label: Hidden Bias
items.description: Resumes hide talent; data-first assessments strip out gender, age and pedigree bias so the right person—nothing else—wins.

items.label: No Skills Visibility
items.description: Live skills maps show who can code, sell or scale today. Match internals or externals to any role in seconds, not weeks of interviews.

items.label: Low Mobility
items.description: Stop losing great people to boredom. Our engine flags ready-to-grow insiders and fast-tracks them into open roles, cutting churn before it starts.

items.label: Poor Scalability
items.description: Headcount doubles overnight? Our cloud-native platform spins up thousands of requisitions, interviews and offers without extra headcount or hardware.

product.title: One Platform, Full Talent Intelligence
product.subtitle: LeapIn uses behavioral AI to predict skills, potential, and fit — powering smarter talent decisions across the entire employee lifecycle, all on a single enterprise platform.

items.title:
AI Talent
Acquisition
items.subtitle:
Hire for skills and potential
— not resumes.
items.description: Predict on-the-job success with behavioral AI that delivers faster, fairer, and more consistent hiring.

items.title:
AI Talent
Marketplace
items.subtitle:
Make skills visible.
Unlock internal mobility.
items.description: Create a dynamic internal talent marketplace with predictive skill profiling and role matching.

items.title:
AI Talent
Development
items.subtitle: Develop people with precision.
items.description: Personalize growth and succession planning using real skill gaps and business priorities.

stats.title: Proven ROI at Enterprise Scale
stats.subtitle: Serving leading organizations across 8 major industries worldwide.

cta.title: Turn Talent Into Your Competitive Advantage
cta.subtitle: See how LeapIn helps global enterprises make smarter talent decisions with AI.

enterprises.title:
Built for Enterprises
That Can’t Afford Talent Mistakes

items.label: Trained on billions of data points

hero.title: The LeapIn Talent
hero.subtitle: Platform
hero.description:
A single AI platform to hire, develop, and mobilize talent — globally and at scale.
LeapIn moves beyond traditional HR systems to deliver skills-based intelligence across your workforce.

partners.title: Trusted by Global Enterprises
partners.description: Serving leading organizations across 8 major industries worldwide.

content.title: Predict skills before you hire.
content.description: LeapIn predicts skills, potential, and fit using behavioral AI — enabling faster, fairer, and more accurate hiring decisions at scale.

content.title: Turn hidden talent into strategic advantage.
content.description: LeapIn continuously maps skills and potential to internal roles, projects, and succession needs.

content.title: Align people growth with business strategy.
content.description: LeapIn identifies skill gaps and delivers personalized development pathways aligned to business priorities.

aiMatching.title: AI Smart Matching
aiMatching.description: Based on big data and machine learning algorithms, precisely match enterprise needs with talent skills

globalTalent.title: Global Talent Pool
globalTalent.description: Covering quality talent resources from 200+ countries and regions, meeting diverse enterprise needs

hero.title: AI
hero.subtitle: Solutions
hero.description: LeapIn helps enterprises solve their most critical workforce challenges with intelligence — not intuition.

talentSourcing.title: Talent Sourcing
talentSourcing.description: Quickly locate and screen quality candidates through AI technology, significantly improving recruitment efficiency

talentAssessment.title: Talent Assessment
talentAssessment.description: Multi-dimensional evaluation system for scientific assessment of candidate capabilities and potential

onboarding.title: Onboarding
onboarding.description: Optimize new employee onboarding experience and accelerate team integration

development.title: Development
development.description: Personalized career development planning to support employee growth

hero.title: Real-World Accuracy.
hero.subtitle: Intelligence.
hero.description: LeapIn’s AI models are tailored to the unique talent challenges of each industry.

list.title: Technology
list.description: Professional technical talent recruitment and management services for tech companies

list.title: Healthcare
list.description: Precise matching and management of healthcare industry professionals

list.title: Financial Services
list.description: High-end talent recruitment and development solutions for the financial industry

list.title: Manufacturing
list.description: Full lifecycle management services for manufacturing talent

list.title: Retail & E-commerce
list.description: Talent recruitment and training for retail and e-commerce industries

list.title: Education
list.description: Professional talent recruitment and development for the education industry

cta.title: Learn More About Industry Solutions
cta.subtitle: Contact us for customized industry solutions

hero.title: How the World Understands Talent
hero.subtitle: Reinventing
hero.description: LeapIn was founded on a simple belief: Talent decisions should be intelligent, fair, and future-focused.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.info:
To help organizations see people clearly
— and unlock their full potential through AI.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.info: A world where skills, potential, and opportunity are visible — for everyone.

ourStory.title: Our Story
ourStory.description: Founded in 2020, LeapIn is dedicated to revolutionizing global talent recruitment and management through AI technology. We believe technology can break geographical boundaries and seamlessly connect exceptional talent with enterprises.

ourMission.title: Our Mission
ourMission.description: Through innovative AI technology and a global service network, we help enterprises efficiently manage overseas talent and achieve their globalization strategic goals.

ourValues.title: Our Values
ourValues.description: Innovation, Integrity, Excellence, Globalization - these are the core values we always uphold. We believe that through continuous innovation and quality service, we can create greater value for our clients.

ourTeam.title: Our Team
ourTeam.description: A global professional team with extensive HR and technical experience

joinUs.title: Join Us
joinUs.description: We're looking for passionate talent to join our team
